languages.text: "Необычная ситуация — ксеносы убивают ксеносов. Что скажут остальные?"
"An unusual situation — xenos slaying xenos. What do the rest of you think?"
languages.original_text: "Необычная ситуация — ксеносы убивают ксеносов. Что скажут остальные?"

traits.locale_text: "An unusual situation — xenos slaying xenos. What do the rest of you think?"
"An unusual situation — xenos slaying xenos. What do the rest of you think?"
"An unusual situation — xenos slaying xenos. What do the rest of you think?"

languages.text: 「異種同士の殺し合い。皆さんはどう思う？」
languages.original_text: "An unusual situation — xenos slaying xenos. What do the rest of you think?"

traits.locale_text: 「異種同士の殺し合い。皆さんはどう思う？」

languages.text: «Una situación singular: xenos matando xenos. ¿Qué opinan los demás?».
languages.original_text: "An unusual situation — xenos slaying xenos. What do the rest of you think?"

traits.locale_text: «Una situación singular: xenos matando xenos. ¿Qué opinan los demás?».

languages.text: “异形内斗，倒是稀奇。诸位有什么看法？”
languages.original_text: "An unusual situation — xenos slaying xenos. What do the rest of you think?"

traits.locale_text: “异形内斗，倒是稀奇。诸位有什么看法？”

languages.text: "Eine ungewöhnliche Situation ... Xenos, die Xenos töten. Was denkt der Rest von Euch?"
languages.original_text: "An unusual situation — xenos slaying xenos. What do the rest of you think?"

traits.locale_text: "Eine ungewöhnliche Situation ... Xenos, die Xenos töten. Was denkt der Rest von Euch?"

languages.text: "Sıra dışı bir durum. Zeno, zenoyu katlediyor. Kalanlarımız ne düşünüyor?"
languages.original_text: "An unusual situation — xenos slaying xenos. What do the rest of you think?"

traits.locale_text: "Sıra dışı bir durum. Zeno, zenoyu katlediyor. Kalanlarımız ne düşünüyor?"

languages.text: « Des xénos qui massacrent d'autres xénos... Voilà une situation pour le moins inhabituelle. Qu'en pensez-vous ? »
languages.original_text: "An unusual situation — xenos slaying xenos. What do the rest of you think?"

traits.locale_text: « Des xénos qui massacrent d'autres xénos... Voilà une situation pour le moins inhabituelle. Qu'en pensez-vous ? »
